lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਵਡ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਪੋਹੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad vadd rog na pohe tis maae |
lines.english: Suffering, pain, terrible disease and Maya do not afflict them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਇਆਲ ਓਨੑਾ ਮਿਹਰ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat tere deaal onaa mihar paae |
lines.english: O Merciful Lord, You bless Your devotees with Your Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਤਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਨ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਹੇ ਅਘਾਇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: peevat amrit naam jan naame rahe aghaae |14|
lines.english: Drinking in the Ambrosial Amrit of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, His humble servants remain satisfied with the Naam. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਇਕੋ ਇਕੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa din rain iko ik dhiaae |
lines.english: Forever and ever, day and night, they meditate on the One and Only Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਏਹੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa ehu adhaar gun govind gaae |
lines.english: This is the Support of the devotees, that they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਬਿਘਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਾਗਤੇ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott bighan tis laagate jis no visarai naau |
lines.english: Millions of obstacles stand in the way of one who forgets the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਬਿਲਪਤੇ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੈ ਘਰਿ ਕਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak anadin bilapate jiau sunyai ghar kaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, night and day, he croaks like a raven in a deserted house. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੀ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਜਾ ਥੀਐ ਸਾਈ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਰੁਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: piree milaavaa jaa theeai saaee suhaavee rut |
lines.english: Beauteous is that season, when I am united with my Beloved.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰਬੀਰ ਵਰੀਆਮ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਹੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: soorabeer vareeaam kinai na horreeai |
lines.english: Even brave and mighty men cannot withstand the powerful

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤੁ ਨਹ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਵੀਐ ਨਿਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gharree muhat neh veesarai naanak raveeai nit |2|
lines.english: I do not forget Him for a moment or an instant; O Nanak, I contemplate Him constantly. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਣਿ ਜਿਣਿ ਲੈਨੑਿ ਰਲਾਇ ਏਹੋ ਏਨਾ ਲੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jin jin laina ralaae eho enaa lorreeai |
lines.english: They seek to conquer and overpower them, and so increase their following.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਨਾਰੀ ਅਉਧੂਤ ਦੇਨਿ ਚਮੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: das naaree aaudhoot den chamorreeai |
lines.english: The ten organs of sensation attach even detached renunciates to sensory pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਉਜ ਸਤਾਣੀ ਹਾਠ ਪੰਚਾ ਜੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: fauj sataanee haatth panchaa jorreeai |
lines.english: And overwhelming army which the five passions have gathered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਇਨ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਮੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun in kai vas kinai na morreeai |
lines.english: The world of the three dispositions is under their influence; no one can stand against them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਕੋਟੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਖਾਈ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਤੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bharam kott maaeaa khaaee kahu kit bidh torreeai |
lines.english: So tell me - how can the fort of doubt and the moat of Maya be overcome?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਆਰਾਧਿ ਬਿਖਮ ਦਲੁ ਫੋੜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa aaraadh bikham dal forreeai |
lines.english: Worshipping the Perfect Guru, this awesome force is subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਰਹਾ ਕਰ ਜੋੜੀਐ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: hau tis agai din raat rahaa kar jorreeai |15|
lines.english: I stand before Him, day and night, with my palms pressed together. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕਲੇਸਾ ਊਪਜਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kott kalesaa aoopajeh naanak bisarai naau |1|
lines.english: Millions of afflictions are produced, O Nanak, when the Name is forgotten. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਸਭੇ ਉਤਰਨਿ ਨੀਤ ਨੀਤ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh sabhe utaran neet neet gun gaau |
lines.english: All sins are washed away, by continually singing the Lord's Glories.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਭੇਟਿਐ ਪੂਰੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੁਗਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur bhettiai pooree hovai jugat |
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting the True Guru, one comes to know the Perfect Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਸੰਦਿਆ ਖੇਲੰਦਿਆ ਪੈਨੰਦਿਆ ਖਾਵੰਦਿਆ ਵਿਚੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hasandiaa khelandiaa painandiaa khaavandiaa viche hovai mukat |2|
lines.english: While laughing, playing, dressing and eating, he is liberated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਜੋੜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: so satigur vaahu vaahu jin har siau jorriaa |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! - Hail! Hail! to the True Guru, who has united me with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਭਰਮ ਗੜੁ ਤੋੜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: so satigur dhan dhan jin bharam garr torriaa |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is the True Guru, who has demolished the fortress of doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ਤਿਨੈ ਬਿਦਾਰੂਓ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa rog bikaraal tinai bidaarooo |
lines.english: He has banished the great and terrible disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਇ ਦਾਰੂਓ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan akhutt gur dee daarooo |
lines.english: The Guru has given me the medicine of the inexhaustible treasure of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jitaa janam apaar aap pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: I have obtained eternal life, recognizing my own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਗੁਰ ਸਮਰਥ ਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: mahimaa kahee na jaae gur samarath dev |
lines.english: The Glory of the all-powerful Divine Guru cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਖਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paaeaa naam nidhaan bahut khajaaniaa |
lines.english: I have obtained the great treasure of the wealth of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਅਪਰੰਪਰ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: gur paarabraham paramesur aparanpar alakh abhev |16|
lines.english: The Guru is the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, infinite, unseen and unknowable. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮੁ ਕਰੇਦਿਆ ਜੀਉ ਤੂੰ ਕਮਾਵਦਿਆ ਸੁਖ ਭੁੰਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: audam karediaa jeeo toon kamaavadiaa sukh bhunch |
lines.english: Make the effort, and you shall live; practicing it, you shall enjoy peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਇਦਿਆ ਤੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮਿਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਉਤਰੀ ਚਿੰਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhiaaeidiaa toon prabhoo mil naanak utaree chint |1|
lines.english: Meditating, you shall meet God, O Nanak, and your anxiety shall vanish. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਰਉ ਇਕ ਘੜੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na visrau ik gharree kar kirapaa bhagavant |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, may I never forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, for even an instant; be merciful to me, Lord God. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਭ ਚਿੰਤਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਮਣ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: subh chintan gobind raman niramal saadhoo sang |
lines.english: Bless me with sublime thoughts, O Lord of the Universe, and contemplation in the immaculate Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਾਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੀਉ ਅਰਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis mil japeeai naau tis jeeo arapeeai |
lines.english: Meeting Him, I meditate on the Name - I offer my soul to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਹੋਇ ਤ ਕਾਹੇ ਡਰਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: teraa keetaa hoe ta kaahe ddarapeeai |
lines.english: Whatever happens is according to Your Will, so why should I be afraid?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਪੋਹੇ ਕਵਣੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਵਲਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis no pohe kavan jis val nirankaar |
lines.english: Who can touch one who has the Formless Lord on his side?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਐ ਚਿਤਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਬੇਸੁਮਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aaeiai chit nihaal saahib besumaar |
lines.english: When the Infinite Lord comes to mind, one is enraptured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh tis kai vas na koee baaharaa |
lines.english: Everything is under His control; no one is beyond Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਤੂੰ ਰਖਣ ਵਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tere daas dhiaaein tudh toon rakhan vaaliaa |
lines.english: Your slaves meditate on You; You are the Savior, the Protector Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਭਗਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: so bhagataa man vutthaa sach samaaharaa |
lines.english: He, the True Lord, dwells in the minds of His devotees.
